scroll_found.title: Research the Thermal Control scroll at a Research Pedestal

insulate.title: Maintain body temperature within the safe range for 10 minutes in an extreme biome (desert or tundra)

subtitle.text: Cold Sweat: your body temperature is a resource. Manage it like one.

description: CH.06 · THERMAL CONTROL
▸ Cold Sweat tracks your body temperature
against the ambient temperature of the biome.
The Nether is 120°F+ in the open.
The tundra is near 0°F.
Both extremes kill you if you're unprepared.
◈ THERMAL MANAGEMENT TOOLS
└ Warm: Fur armor, leather with fur lining,
heating items, hot food (hot meals = warmth bonus)
└ Cool: Water drinking, cooling food,
stone/iron armor (metal = cold conduction — helps in heat)
└ Insulation items: fur, silk, specific Cold Sweat items
└ 30 unique Cold Sweat items confirmed
◈ BIOME TEMPERATURE REFERENCE
└ Desert: 120°F — needs cooling
└ Tundra/Snowy: near 0°F — needs warming
└ Ocean: cool and moderate
└ Nether Wastes: 120°F ambient — same as desert
└ Basalt Deltas: extremely hot
└ Warped Forest: moderate for Nether
◈ SCROLL: Thermal Control
└ Found in: cold biome shelter chests,
thermal engineering ruins, research camp loot
└ Research time: 20 min
└ Unlocks: full Cold Sweat item list, biome temp chart
▸ The scroll was found frozen into a glacier.
The person who wrote it understood
that surviving the cold required knowing the cold.
They survived it. The glacier preserved the proof.
▶ Find The Thermal Control scroll [check]
▶ Maintain temperature in an extreme biome for 10 min [check]
◇ Freeze It & Heat It (Ch02 intro) and Cold Sweat
both affect food — frozen biomes preserve food longer,
hot biomes spoil it faster. Manage both simultaneously.
